subject: biology
title: 19M.3.HL.TZ2.7
question_html: Outline the process that could result in spina bifida during neural tube development.
solution_html:
a. neural tube formed by infolding of ectoderm/outer tissue layer ✔

b. «spina bifida» caused by «embryonic» neural tube not closing off completely ✔

c. « spina bifida» results in backbone vertebrae/spinal cord not closing/fusing properly ✔

Award marks for marking points in an annotated diagram.
examiners_html: Most candidates knew what spina bifida is but had a bit more difficulty expressing how it occurs using appropriate terminology. Many confused ectoderm with neural plate.
